metadata.description: SprintFoundry: three-agent GAN sprint harness for AI-driven software development. Planner → Generator (Codex CLI) → Evaluator with quality gates and auto-semver.

plugins.name: sprintfoundry
plugins.description: Three-agent GAN sprint harness (Planner → Codex Generator → Evaluator). Orchestrates any software project through CONTRACT → APPROVAL → IMPLEMENT → EVALUATE cycles with code quality gates, auto-versioning, and retry logic.
